title: # [#fx_unit_gods]
content:
# [#fx_unit_gods]

## |[ FX_UNIT_G0D_MODEL ]|
Mythological representations of each FX module and how they shape signal + narrative.

| FX UNIT | GOD-NAME | EFFECT TYPE | ROLE IN SYSTEM |
|---------------|---------------------|----------------------------------|-------------------------------|
| FILTER | The Divider | Frequency split | Cuts truth from noise |
| COMPRESSOR | The Enforcer | Dynamic flattening | Tames chaos, lifts silence |
| KNEE | The Softbreaker | Threshold onset curve | Bends or breaks fate |
| THRESHOLD | The Judge | Activation line | Determines consequence |
| EXPANDER | The Unraveler | Dynamic enhancer | Pulls whispers into shout |
| ENVELOPE FOL. | The Listener | Follows input contour | Breath follower |
